guide:
## Quintashi

Quintashi is a very rare spawn in Abysmal sea, in the deep ravines, *no quest required*. You can see the cave entrace from the top of the water. He spawns in the cave near where Quintashi's Handmaiden spawns for the Arios 55. Raid quality mob (25  people).

Bring Breathe Water potions made by Alchemists (or buy the 1 point breathe water cm). His weapon allegedly has death touch, so send in pets first, then tank. Quintashi is all melee, no AoE, no casting, but he is tough. You can stay in the outside room and con whether or not he's up.
